requirements.requirement: Access to the portal through personal credential authentication.
Visualize the applications of the portal to which the user has access.
Access the applications to which the user has access in the portal.
Restrict the visualization and actions (create, modify and delete) on data according to the roles assigned to the user.
Guarantee that data of other clients cannot be accessed.
Convert any mention of the old name to the new name.
Assign or revoke access to applications to users.
Primary keys: (User, id), (Language, id), (ClusterType, id), (Application, id), (Authority, id), (Role, id), (Brand, id), (Cluster, id).
Each language_id of each content table belongs to an existing Language.
Dates must be valid and cannot be later than the present.
For all applicable tables, there cannot be elements of the same type with the same code.
Authorizations and Cluster assigned to a user must be of the same Cluster type as the user.
Authorizations assigned to a user must be of some of the brands that the associated Cluster contains.
The new content must maintain visual coherence with the design of the old version of the application.
The system must be easy to use for any user.
The application must be available in several languages.
The user must be able to perform new operations without special training.
Query operations must have a load time less than 1 second.
The web application must guarantee continuous and stable operation, ensuring its availability at any time.
The web application must support a large number of simultaneous users without degrading its performance.
The system must allow the creation, consultation, modification and deletion of data to authorized users.
The application must manage a strict separation of data for each client.
The provider for this project is Amazon Web Services.
The client has been developed with Angular.
Spring Boot has been used for the server.
The message exchange protocol used in this case is HTTP.
The data format used is JSON.
Java OpenJDK 17.
For the deployment of the application, Amazon EKS has been used.
